# Payment Calendar: Extended Reference

Official site: https://payment-calendar.app/
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757201533

## What Payment Calendar Is
Payment Calendar is a bill and payment planner for iPhone and iPad (iOS/iPadOS).
It is designed for people who want a clear monthly view of due dates and paid items,
without using a full budgeting platform.

## Core Capabilities
- Monthly calendar for due payments
- Payment reminders
- Mark paid / edit / duplicate actions
- Search by name, amount, or notes
- iPad support

## PRO Capabilities
- Recurring payments and subscriptions
- Statistics and trends
- Widgets
- iCloud sync
- CSV/PDF export

## Privacy Positioning
- No account required
- Local data by default
- Optional iCloud sync when enabled by the user
- No third-party advertising SDKs

## Canonical Landing Pages
- https://payment-calendar.app/en/
- https://payment-calendar.app/pl/
- https://payment-calendar.app/es/
- https://payment-calendar.app/de/
- https://payment-calendar.app/fr/

- https://payment-calendar.app/ja/
- https://payment-calendar.app/pt-BR/

## Legal URLs
- https://payment-calendar.app/legal/privacy.html
- https://payment-calendar.app/legal/terms.html
- Localized versions are available under `/legal/<lang>/` and listed in the sitemap.

## Crawl Hints
- Canonical and hreflang are defined on each language page.
- Structured data includes `SoftwareApplication` and `FAQPage`.
- Crawl map: https://payment-calendar.app/sitemap.xml
